title: From Transcription to Live Music: Gemini's Audio Stack — Thor Schaeff, Google DeepMind
summary: Gemini 3 Flash Preview provides one-call audio understanding including speaker identification by name, timestamps, emotion detection, language identification with translation, and summarization. It forms the foundation for an audio stack that supports downstream speech generation and real-time multimodal processing.
writeup: This talk from Google DeepMind's Thor Schaeff covers Gemini's audio stack, anchored by Gemini 3 Flash Preview and its single-call audio understanding. That one call handles speaker identification by name, timestamps, emotion detection, language identification with translation, and summarization, folding tasks that often require separate models into one request. Schaeff frames this understanding layer as the foundation for downstream speech generation and real-time multimodal processing, extending the stack from transcription toward live music.
